ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the client */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness professional */,
  "professional_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fitness professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fitness professional */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fitness professional */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the fitness professional */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the fitness professional */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_professional_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client-professional relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fitness professional */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_professional_relationship_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES fitness_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_professional_relationship_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout plan */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fitness professional who created the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the workout plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the workout plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout plan */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Specific goals of the workout plan */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the workout plan */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the workout plan */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plans_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES fitness_professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plans_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dietary_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary recommendation */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fitness professional who provided the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_name" TEXT /* Name of the dietary recommendation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the dietary recommendation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the dietary recommendation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dietary recommendation */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Specific goals of the dietary recommendation */,
  "calorie_intake" INTEGER /* Recommended daily calorie intake */,
  "meal_plan" TEXT /* Meal plan description */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dietary_recommendations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dietary_recommendations_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES fitness_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fitness professional who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the client's progress */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Key metrics tracked */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Additional recommendations based on the progress */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES fitness_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health insight */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the health data */,
  "insight_description" TEXT /* Description of the health insight */,
  "research_date" TEXT /* Date when the research was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data used for the insight */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the insight */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, professional, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
